name: 20-minute Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 small red or green bell pepper, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to boil. Add potatoes and cook 12 minutes or until tender.
2. Drain the potatoes well.
3. In a bowl, toss the cooked potatoes with remaining ingredients.
4. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
5. Makes 6 servings.
